results.title: Cristian Volpato to switch allegiance from Italy to Australia in time for World Cup - The Guardian
results.description: Cristian Volpato to switch allegiance from Italy to Australia in time for World Cup The Guardian Cristian Volpato set to swap Italy for Socceroos ESPN Socceroos boosted as young midfielder switches allegiance from Italy Australian Broadcasting Corporation Volpato makes bombshell switch to the Socceroos days before World Cup SMH.com.au Australia divided as defector crawls back News.com.au

results.title: AFL confirm controversial umpire ruling
results.description: The AFL have announced that they are in agreeance with the umpire's controversial call to deny Hawthorn's Nick Watson of a goal on the verge of half-time on Thursday evening.

results.title: South Korea football chief to quit after 13 years of scandals
results.description: South Korea’s top football official will resign after the World Cup, citing his ‘lack of virtue’ amid mounting criticism over his leadership.
